meta.description: Evidence packet for dev.to 5-repo article review

fastapi.note: 499 is MDS-specific count from case study; 360 is total finding count in benchmark corpus

django.draft_claim: score remained stable across many releases, then dropped after deprecation cleanup
django.note: Trend claim based on case study analysis; no specific finding count asserted in draft

pydantic.note: 117 is EDS-specific count from case study; 221 is total finding count in benchmark corpus

paramiko.draft_claim: a large transport module and circular dependency hotspots
paramiko.note: NO BENCHMARK DATA. No case study exists. No stored run. Draft claim is unsupported by any artifact. Either run paramiko locally or replace with a repo that has existing evidence.

drift_self.draft_claim: stable short-term trend with visible sensitivity to focused refactors
drift_self.note: drift_self has benchmark data (score 0.514, 80 findings) but the specific trend claim is not supported by a stored trend artifact

evidence_gaps: paramiko: no benchmark data, no case study, no stored run — draft claim unsupported
drift_self: trend claim not backed by a stored trend comparison artifact
all repos: benchmark data was generated at unknown date; drift version of the runs is not recorded in all_results.json
recommendation: Replace paramiko with a repo from the existing 15-repo corpus that has a case study (e.g., Flask, Starlette, Celery, Rich). Alternatively, clone paramiko and run drift analyze to generate missing evidence.
